summary: Generative AI Engineer and Technical Lead with hands-on experience designing, developing, and deploying LLM-powered applications, RAG pipelines, and multi-agent (Agentic AI) systems in Python. Strong in LangChain and LangGraph, Prompt Engineering, vector databases, model fine-tuning, and RLHF (PPO/DPO), with proven REST API integration and deployment via FastAPI.

education.degree: Master of Technology (M.tech) in Computer Technology

education.institution: University Institute of Technology, University of Burdwan
education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering (B.E) in Computer Science and Engineering

experience.title: Technical Lead
experience.subtitle: Generative AI, RAG, Agentic AI & LLM Fine-tuning

groups.heading: RAG & LLM Applications
bullets: Designed, developed, and deployed end-to-end RAG pipelines using LangChain, integrating all-mpnet-base-v2 embeddings, ChromaDB/FAISS vector databases, and Mistral-7B-Instruct for grounded response generation.
Benchmarked multiple LLMs on latency, BLEU, and ROUGE to drive prompt optimization and response evaluation, improving retrieval quality & answer faithfulness.
Built a production chatbot / AI assistant using Cohere models and Gradio, applying Prompt Engineering to achieve superior accuracy and efficiency.

groups.heading: LLM Fine-tuning
bullets: Fine-tuned LLMs (CodeLlama, CodeT5-220M) to predict taint propagation and sink vulnerabilities from Java method signatures.
Achieved a 25% accuracy improvement in taint prediction (CodeLlama) and 15% in sink-vulnerability detection (CodeT5-220M); benchmarked against CatBoost.

groups.heading: Agentic AI & Multi-Agent Systems
bullets: Developed a multi-agent (Agentic AI) solution generating requirements documents (URS, SRS) in real time, built on LangGraph's Multi-Agent Supervisor architecture with inter-agent communication, error handling, and loop control.
